prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个简单的粒子喷泉。粒子从底部中央发射，向上升起并带有轻微的随机水平偏移，到达顶部时逐渐消失。最多200个粒子。每个粒子：从暖色调色板中随机取色（红/橙/黄），大小2-5px，逐渐缩小。重力将粒子拉回形成弧线。黑色背景。连续动画循环。

test_cases.name: Creative page keeps a real visual surface instead of only shell text

steps.expression: (()=>{const surf=document.querySelector('canvas,svg'); if(surf) return true; return document.querySelectorAll('[class*=card], section, article').length>=4;})()

test_cases.name: Particle controls or canvas interaction visibly change the simulation state

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

test_cases.name: Particles emit from bottom center (y > 50% of canvas)

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(0,c.height*0.7,c.width,c.height*0.3).data;let bright=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>50)bright++;}return bright>20;}catch(e){return true;}})()

test_cases.name: Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["2-5", "200"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Prompt-grounded content remains intact after delay instead of only avoiding a crash

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["2-5", "200"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with particles

prompt: 用Canvas创建一个星空粒子背景, 单个HTML文件。200颗星星(白色小圆点, 大小1-3px随机)在深蓝背景上缓慢闪烁(opacity 0.3-1.0循环)。偶尔有流星划过(一条快速移动的亮线, 带尾迹渐隐, 随机方向, 每5秒出现一次)。鼠标移动时附近的星星轻微偏移(视差效果)。全屏Canvas。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["0.3-1.0", "1-3", "200"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with star particles

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个鼠标轨迹粒子系统。鼠标移动时粒子从光标位置持续发射。每个粒子：从光标处向外随机速度，彩虹光谱随机颜色，起始4px在2秒内缩小到0，受轻微重力向下拉。轨迹淡化：前一帧以低透明度黑色覆盖（产生拖尾幽灵效果）。点击在所有方向爆发50个粒子。角落显示粒子计数。FPS计数器。全屏Canvas，深色背景。

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个烟花粒子效果, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。点击画面任意位置发射烟花: 一个发射粒子从底部升起到点击高度, 然后爆炸成100-200个彩色粒子(球形扩散, 带重力下落)。粒子颜色: 每次爆炸一个随机色系(红系/蓝系/金系/绿系, 带亮度变化)。尾迹效果: 半透明黑色覆盖实现。声音: 可选(Web Audio短促爆炸音)。同时支持多个烟花。连续点击可连发。深蓝夜空背景+底部城市天际线剪影(简单矩形)。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with city skyline background

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个流体粒子模拟。500个表现像液体的粒子：受重力下落，在底部汇聚，绕障碍物流动。屏幕中央有两个固定圆形障碍物。粒子与障碍物和彼此碰撞（简单排斥力）。点击在光标位置释放50个新粒子。根据速度着色（慢=蓝色，快=白色）。摇晃效果：按空格键对所有粒子施加随机力。粘度滑块（低=水，高=蜂蜜）。粒子计数显示。深色背景。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["500"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}, {"selector": "input[type=range]", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with particles

prompt: 创建一个音频可视化粒子系统, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。用正弦波模拟音频频谱数据(32个频段)。1000个粒子排列成圆环, 每个粒子的Y偏移由对应频段值驱动, 形成波浪效果。粒子颜色随频率变化(低频=蓝, 中频=绿, 高频=红)。中心显示'Now Playing'文字。整个圆环缓慢旋转。鼠标悬停暂停旋转。频率和振幅可通过两个滑块调节。3种可视化模式按钮切换: 圆环/柱状/波形。深色背景, 霓虹效果(glow)。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with ring visualization

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个星系粒子模拟。10000个粒子形成螺旋星系。参数：3条旋臂、旋转速度、旋臂紧密度、粒子扩散（均可通过滑块调节）。粒子按距中心距离着色（白色核心→蓝色中间→红色外圈）。中心明亮核心发光效果。尘埃带（旋臂之间较暗的区域）。背景：远处星场（500个小静态点）。鼠标轨道：拖拽旋转视角（通过缩放Y坐标模拟3D）。缩放：鼠标滚轮。恒星形成：点击创建一簇200个粒子的明亮新星团。星云云效果：带渐变的半透明大圆。FPS计数器。重置按钮。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders galaxy visualization

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个粒子文字变形效果。在输入框中输入文字。文字渲染到隐藏Canvas上，然后从文字像素中采样粒子位置。2000个粒子从当前位置平滑动画移动到新文字形状。空闲时粒子带微妙噪声运动随机漂移。过渡：旧文字溶解（粒子散开），新文字组装（粒子汇聚）。颜色：文字上的渐变（左=青色，右=品红色）。鼠标排斥：鼠标移动到粒子附近时暂时推开它们。粒子拖尾效果。背景：深色带微妙网格。字号滑块。动画速度滑块。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个弹跳球模拟。10个不同大小（半径10-30px）的彩色圆在矩形边界内弹跳。物理效果：重力、弹性墙壁碰撞（弹跳时能量损失0.9）、球与球碰撞。点击添加新的随机球。球留下渐隐轨迹。黑色背景。

test_cases.name: Prompt-grounded structure is present instead of a generic shell

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["10-30", "0.9"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个摆波模拟。15个长度递增的摆从水平横杆上悬挂。同时释放——它们以不同频率振荡，产生迷人的波浪图案。物理：简谐运动，周期与sqrt(长度)成正比。轨迹线显示最近路径。慢动作切换（0.25倍速）。暂停/继续。重力滑块。阻尼滑块。重置按钮。深色背景，摆锤为彩色（从左到右彩虹渐变）。

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

prompt: 创建一个弹簧质点系统可视化, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。一条水平弹簧链: 10个质点(圆球)由弹簧(波浪线)连接, 两端固定。点击拖拽任意质点使其偏离平衡位置, 释放后弹簧振荡。物理: 胡克定律(F=-kx)+阻尼。弹簧可见(正弦波形, 压缩时密集, 拉伸时稀疏)。能量显示: 动能(红色条)+势能(蓝色条)+总能量(绿色线)。弹性系数k和阻尼系数b各一个滑块。重力开关(开启后质点下垂)。轨迹线(质点运动轨迹)。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=[];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=true;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders spring-mass system

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个双摆混沌可视化。一个双摆（两段连杆带摆锤）。物理：拉格朗日力学方程实现双摆（混沌运动）。绘制第二个摆锤的轨迹为随时间渐隐的彩色线条。轨迹按速度着色（慢=蓝色，快=红色）。点击任意位置设置新初始角度。参数：臂长（2个滑块）、摆锤质量（2个滑块）、重力滑块。显示能量守恒图（动能+势能随时间变化，小SVG图表）。重置。暂停/播放。深色背景。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个布料模拟。30×30的粒子网格通过弹簧约束连接。顶行固定。物理：Verlet积分、重力、风力。鼠标交互：点击拖拽抓取并拉扯布料，右键点击撕裂（永久断开约束）。风：开关切换并带方向控制（左/右按钮）。布料渲染为彩色网格（三角形根据张力着色：松弛=蓝色，拉伸=黄色，接近断裂=红色）。自碰撞（布料不会穿过自身）。固定/取消固定粒子（Shift+点击）。障碍物：布料可以披覆的球体（可拖拽）。重置按钮。性能：目标60fps。

prompt: 创建一个流体动力学可视化, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。2D流体模拟(简化Navier-Stokes): 200x150网格, 用颜色表示流速(蓝=慢, 红=快)。鼠标拖拽注入流体(沿拖拽方向)和染料(随机颜色)。障碍物: 按O键在鼠标位置放置圆形障碍, 流体绕过。涡旋可见(用流线或粒子追踪)。参数: 粘度滑块, 扩散率滑块, 分辨率选择(低/中/高)。可视化模式: 速度场/压力场/涡度场(3个按钮切换, 不同色图)。暂停/播放。清除按钮。FPS显示。黑色背景。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders fluid simulation

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个N体引力模拟。5个初始天体（行星），不同质量（以圆圈大小表示）和颜色。物理：所有天体对之间的牛顿引力，欧拉积分。每个天体后面的轨迹线（随时间渐隐，颜色匹配天体）。点击添加新天体（初始速度由拖拽方向和长度决定）。新天体质量滑块。时间速度滑块（0.1倍-5倍）。碰撞时合并（守恒动量和质量）。预测轨道：按住Shift查看释放前的预测路径虚线。缩放（滚轮）和平移（鼠标中键拖拽）。能量图（总动能+势能随时间变化）。预设场景：双星系统、太阳系、8字形。质心十字准线。网格叠加切换。深色太空背景带星噪点。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个随机几何图案生成器。每次页面加载生成一个独特图案：50-100个随机形状（圆形、矩形、三角形），随机位置、大小（10-80px）、颜色（柔和色调）和旋转角度。形状有不同透明度（0.3-0.8）。'重新生成'按钮创建新图案。'保存为PNG'按钮。白色背景。最小重叠。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["0.3-0.8", "50-100", "10-80", "save as png", "regenerate"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders with geometric shapes

prompt: 用Canvas创建一个万花尺(Spirograph)生成器, 单个HTML文件。自动绘制螺旋线图案: 两个圆的组合运动轨迹。3个滑块控制参数: 大圆半径(50-200), 小圆半径(10-100), 画笔偏移(10-80)。绘制过程可视(逐步画线, 不是一次出现)。颜色选择器。线宽滑块(1-5px)。清除按钮。保存PNG按钮。白色背景。

test_cases.name: 3个滑块
Regenerate changes the generative pattern state

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders spirograph pattern

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个分形树生成器。从底部中央向上生长的递归分支树。参数（滑块）：分支角度（15-60度）、分支长度比（0.5-0.9）、递归深度（3-12）、树干宽度（1-10px）。颜色：分支从棕色（树干）渐变到绿色（末端）。树叶：末端分支上的小圆（可开关）。风效果：分支基于正弦函数摇摆动画。季节切换：春天（绿叶+花朵）、夏天（全绿）、秋天（橙/红色落叶）、冬天（光秃分支+雪）。使用不同随机种子重新生成按钮。

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个Perlin噪声地形生成器, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。生成2D高度图: 用Perlin噪声算法(JS实现)生成256x256网格。可视化模式: (1)灰度高度图, (2)彩色地形(蓝=水<0.3, 绿=平原0.3-0.5, 棕=山地0.5-0.7, 白=雪山>0.7), (3)等高线图(10条等高线)。参数: 缩放scale(1-100), 八度octaves(1-6), 持久度persistence(0-1)各一个滑块。随机种子按钮(重新生成)。3D预览: CSS perspective倾斜查看地形起伏。导出PNG。鼠标悬停显示坐标和高度值。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders terrain heightmap

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个元胞自动机（生命游戏）。80×60网格。开始前点击单元格切换存活/死亡。开始/停止/单步按钮。速度滑块（1-60 fps）。图案：5个预设按钮（滑翔机、闪烁器、脉冲星、Gosper滑翔机枪、随机）。网格线切换。种群计数器。世代计数器。边缘环绕切换。颜色：存活单元格按年龄变色（新=亮绿，老=深绿）。缩放（鼠标滚轮）。平移（拖拽）。清除按钮。保存/加载状态（localStorage）。深色背景。

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["1-60", "80x60", "generation", "gen"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas, td", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个生成艺术工作室。6种算法模式通过标签页选择：(1)流场（Perlin噪声矢量，粒子跟随场）、(2)圆填充（不重叠的圆填满空间）、(3)Voronoi图（随机种子点生成的彩色区域）、(4)迷宫生成器（递归回溯法，动画演示）、(5)L系统（可配置规则的植物状结构）、(6)Mandelbrot集（可缩放分形）。每种模式：参数滑块、颜色方案选择器（5种预设）、动画开关、随机种子、导出PNG。共享控制：画布尺寸选择器、背景色。性能：重计算使用Web Worker（Mandelbrot）。画廊：保存到localStorage收藏，查看已保存作品。

test_cases.name: 6 algorithm mode tabs present

prompt: 创建一个交互式分形艺术生成器, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。Julia集分形: 参数c的实部和虚部由鼠标位置控制(鼠标移动实时更新分形图案)。颜色映射: 5种预设色板(彩虹/火焰/海洋/紫金/灰度)可切换。缩放: 鼠标滚轮放大(最大10000x)。平移: 右键拖拽。迭代次数滑块(50-500, 影响精细度)。抗锯齿选项(2x超采样, 切换按钮)。实时FPS显示。坐标显示(鼠标位置对应的复平面坐标)。录制功能: 点击录制按钮, 移动鼠标, 自动截图序列(每200ms一帧, 最多50帧), 停止后播放为动画(循环)。Mandelbrot模式切换按钮。保存当前参数为书签(localStorage, 最多10个, 可加载)。导出高分辨率PNG(2x)。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["50-500,", "10000x", "10000", "500", "200", "10,"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders Julia set fractal

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个模拟神经风格迁移效果。非真实ML——模拟效果：选择源图案（用户从5种几何预设中选择：圆形、正方形、三角形、六边形、波浪）和风格色板（5种选择：莫奈水彩柔和色、梵高粗犷笔触、蒙德里安原色块、葛饰北斋蓝色波浪、克里姆特金色）。算法：使用Voronoi或网格将画布细分为区域，用源图案中的形状和风格色板的颜色填充每个区域，添加纹理噪声，应用边缘检测轮廓。控制：区域数量滑块（50-500）、形状缩放、纹理强度、边缘粗细。动画：5秒内在两种风格之间变形。画廊：渲染4种不同组合的缩略图。全屏切换。下载结果。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["50-500"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 5}, {"selector": "button", "gte": 6}, {"selector": "input[type=range]", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个纯CSS加载动画合集。4个加载器按2×2网格排列：(1)带缺口的旋转圆（border + border-top-color transparent），(2)3个依次脉冲的点（scale动画，交错延迟），(3)弹跳球（translateY配合ease缓动），(4)从左到右填充的进度条（width动画）。全部使用纯CSS @keyframes，无JavaScript。每个下方标注名称。深色背景，白色/蓝色动画。无限循环。

test_cases.name: Creative page keeps a real visual surface instead of only shell text

steps.expression: (()=>{const surf=document.querySelector('canvas,svg'); if(surf) return true; return document.querySelectorAll('[class*=card], section, article').length>=4;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

prompt: 用纯CSS创建一个呼吸灯效果集合, 单个HTML文件。6个圆形'灯', 排成一行, 每个不同颜色(红/橙/黄/绿/蓝/紫)。动画: 每个灯的opacity在0.2和1.0之间循环变化, 相邻灯之间有0.3秒延迟, 形成波浪效果。box-shadow发光效果随opacity同步变化。暗色背景。纯CSS, 无JavaScript。

test_cases.name: Breathing lights change opacity over time while adjacent bulbs stay phase-shifted instead of pulsing in lockstep

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=10&&r.height>=10;};const roundish=el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const br=s.borderRadius||'';const ok=br.includes('%')?parseFloat(br)>=40:parseFloat(br||'0')>=Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.25;return visible(el)&&Math.abs(r.width-r.height)<=Math.max(4,Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.35)&&ok;};const bulbs=[...document.querySelectorAll('.bulb,.light,[class*=bulb],[class*=light],div,span')].filter(roundish).slice(0,6);window.__r30_opacity_before=bulbs.map(el=>Number(getComputedStyle(el).opacity||'0').toFixed(3)).join('|');return bulbs.length>=6;})()

(()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>=10&&r.height>=10;};const roundish=el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const br=s.borderRadius||'';const ok=br.includes('%')?parseFloat(br)>=40:parseFloat(br||'0')>=Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.25;return visible(el)&&Math.abs(r.width-r.height)<=Math.max(4,Math.min(r.width,r.height)*0.35)&&ok;};const bulbs=[...document.querySelectorAll('.bulb,.light,[class*=bulb],[class*=light],div,span')].filter(roundish).slice(0,6);const vals=bulbs.map(el=>Number(getComputedStyle(el).opacity||'0').toFixed(3));return bulbs.length>=6 && vals.join('|')!==window.__r30_opacity_before && (new Set(vals)).size>=3;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个纯CSS按钮hover效果展示。6个按钮按网格排列，每个有不同的hover动画：(1)背景色从左滑入，(2)边框逐条绘入（边框依次出现），(3)从中心扩散的波纹效果，(4)摇晃/晃动，(5)3D翻转显示背面文字，(6)霓虹发光脉冲。全部使用纯CSS过渡和动画。无JavaScript。每个按钮标注其效果名称。深色背景，彩色按钮。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个纯CSS动画太阳系。太阳在中心（黄色带径向发光）。4颗行星环绕：水星（灰色小球，3秒轨道）、金星（橙色中球，5秒）、地球（蓝绿色中球，带一个1秒轨道的小月球，8秒轨道）、火星（红色小球，12秒）。轨道路径显示为虚线圆。行星按比例缩放。背景：深色太空。使用box-shadow点阵的星星。所有动画通过CSS @keyframes和transform: rotate + translateX实现。无JavaScript。

test_cases.name: Orbit paths use dotted circular styling

steps.expression: (()=>{const els=[...document.querySelectorAll('*')].filter(el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>=24&&r.height>=24&&r.width<500&&r.height<500&&parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>=20&&(s.borderStyle==='dotted'||s.borderTopStyle==='dotted'||s.borderLeftStyle==='dotted');});return els.length>=4;})()

prompt: 用纯CSS创建一个文字动画效果集, 单个HTML文件。5种效果竖向排列: (1)逐字打字机(typing effect, 光标闪烁), (2)波浪文字(每个字母上下波动, 延迟递增), (3)霓虹灯文字(text-shadow闪烁发光), (4)渐变流动文字(background-clip:text, 渐变缓慢移动), (5)3D旋转文字(perspective+rotateY循环)。每行一种效果, 标注效果名称。深色背景, 白/彩色文字。全部CSS实现。

test_cases.name: Animated rows expose changing CSS motion state over time

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__round25_css_anim_before=(()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const labels=['typewriter','wavy','neon','gradient','3d'];const nodes=labels.map(label=>[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].find(el=>visible(el)&&((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes(label)))||null);return nodes.map(el=>{if(!el) return '';const s=getComputedStyle(el);const anims=el.getAnimations?el.getAnimations().map(a=>Math.round(a.currentTime||0)).join(','):'';return [s.animationName,s.animationDuration,s.transform,s.backgroundPosition,s.opacity,s.textShadow,anims].join('|');}).join('||');})(); return true;})()

(()=>{const after=(()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const labels=['typewriter','wavy','neon','gradient','3d'];const nodes=labels.map(label=>[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].find(el=>visible(el)&&((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes(label)))||null);return nodes.map(el=>{if(!el) return '';const s=getComputedStyle(el);const anims=el.getAnimations?el.getAnimations().map(a=>Math.round(a.currentTime||0)).join(','):'';return [s.animationName,s.animationDuration,s.transform,s.backgroundPosition,s.opacity,s.textShadow,anims].join('|');}).join('||');})(); return after!==window.__round25_css_anim_before && (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();const labels=['typewriter','wavy','neon','gradient','3d'].every(t=>text.includes(t));const anims=[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].filter(el=>visible(el)&&el.getAnimations&&el.getAnimations().length>0).length;return labels&&anims>=3;})();})()

(()=>{const after=(()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const labels=['typewriter','wavy','neon','gradient','3d'];const nodes=labels.map(label=>[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].find(el=>visible(el)&&((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes(label)))||null);return nodes.map(el=>{if(!el) return '';const s=getComputedStyle(el);const anims=el.getAnimations?el.getAnimations().map(a=>Math.round(a.currentTime||0)).join(','):'';return [s.animationName,s.animationDuration,s.transform,s.backgroundPosition,s.opacity,s.textShadow,anims].join('|');}).join('||');})(); const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const labels=['typewriter','wavy','neon','gradient','3d'].every(t=>text.includes(t)); const darkOk=(()=>{const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];return nums.length<3||Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<180;})(); return labels&&darkOk&&after!==window.__round25_css_rows_before;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建纯CSS动画场景过渡。一个包含4个章节的页面，每个章节占满视口高度。章节间滚动触发CSS scroll-snap和动画过渡。章节1：元素从左侧滑入。章节2：元素带缩放淡入。章节3：元素从3D透视旋转进入。章节4：元素通过clip-path动画绘入。每个章节有标题、段落和装饰图形。右侧导航圆点指示当前章节。使用纯CSS scroll-snap和animation-timeline（或需要时用最少JS的intersection observer回退方案）。每个章节不同的渐变背景。

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个纯CSS动画信息图海报。主题：'互联网的一天'。动画统计数据：(1)发送的邮件数量计数器（CSS滚动数字），(2)Google搜索次数（进度条填充），(3)观看的YouTube视频（时钟指针旋转），(4)发布的推文（小鸟飞过），(5)上传的照片（相机快门动画），(6)在线购物（购物车装满）。每个统计板块有图标（CSS绘制）、动画数字/图形和描述文字。各板块页面加载时交错入场动画（顺序延迟）。滚动触发：后面的板块滚动到视图中时播放动画。配色：蓝色渐变到橙色。完全响应式。打印友好（静态快照）。动画无JavaScript。

test_cases.name: 6 stat sections
Scroll reveals

test_cases.name: Later Internet-stat sections animate when scrolled into view

steps.expression: (()=>{const norm=s=>(''+(s||'')).toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const hasBox=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&r.width>40&&r.height>40;};const tokens=['email','google','youtube','tweet','photo','purchase'];const candidates=[...document.querySelectorAll('section,article,.stat-card,.stat-section,.card,[class*=stat]')].filter(hasBox).map(el=>({el,text:norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||'')})).filter(x=>tokens.some(t=>x.text.includes(t)));const uniq=[];for(const x of candidates){if(!uniq.some(y=>y.el.contains(x.el)||x.el.contains(y.el)))uniq.push(x);}const cards=uniq.slice(0,12);const joined=cards.map(x=>x.text).join(' ');const later=cards.filter(x=>['tweet','photo','purchase','cart','shopping'].some(t=>x.text.includes(t))).slice(0,3);const state=x=>{const s=getComputedStyle(x.el);return {opacity:parseFloat(s.opacity||'1'),transform:s.transform||'',cls:''+(x.el.className||''),anim:s.animationName||'',timeline:''+(s.animationTimeline||''),play:s.animationPlayState||''};};window.__internet_scroll_cards=cards;window.__internet_scroll_later=later;window.__internet_scroll_before=later.map(state);if(later[0])later[0].el.scrollIntoView({block:'center',inline:'nearest'});return cards.length>=6&&later.length>=3&&tokens.every(t=>joined.includes(t));})()

(()=>{const norm=s=>(''+(s||'')).toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const html=norm(document.documentElement.innerHTML||'');const body=norm(document.body.innerText||'');const badTerms=['undefined','nan','syntaxerror','referenceerror','typeerror','[object object]','{{','}}'];const bad=badTerms.some(t=>body.includes(t));const later=window.__internet_scroll_later||[];const before=window.__internet_scroll_before||[];const state=x=>{const s=getComputedStyle(x.el),r=x.el.getBoundingClientRect();return {opacity:parseFloat(s.opacity||'1'),transform:s.transform||'',top:r.top,bottom:r.bottom,cls:''+(x.el.className||''),anim:s.animationName||'',timeline:''+(s.animationTimeline||''),play:s.animationPlayState||''};};const after=later.map(state);const mechanisms=['intersectionobserver','animation-timeline: view','animation-timeline:view','view-timeline','scroll-timeline','addeventlistener','onscroll'];const mechanism=mechanisms.some(t=>html.includes(t));const animatedChange=after.some((a,i)=>{const b=before[i]||{};return Math.abs((a.opacity||1)-(b.opacity||1))>=0.12||a.transform!==b.transform||a.cls!==b.cls||a.anim!==b.anim||a.play!==b.play;});const stateWords=['scroll','trigger','reveal','observe','hidden','animate','visible'];const initiallyPrepared=before.some(b=>(b.opacity||1)<0.95||b.transform!=='none'||stateWords.some(t=>(''+b.cls).toLowerCase().includes(t))||['view','scroll'].some(t=>(''+b.timeline).toLowerCase().includes(t)));const visibleNow=after.some(a=>a.opacity>0.45&&a.bottom>0&&a.top<innerHeight);const labels=later.map(x=>norm(x.el.innerText||x.el.textContent||'')).join(' ');return !bad&&mechanism&&initiallyPrepared&&animatedChange&&visibleNow&&labels.includes('tweet')&&labels.includes('photo')&&(labels.includes('purchase')||labels.includes('cart')||labels.includes('shopping'));})()

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["a day in the life of the internet", "billion", "million", "youtube", "google", "email"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用纯CSS创建一个动画故事书页面, 单个HTML文件。场景: 一个完整的日夜循环动画(30秒一个周期, 无限循环)。白天: 蓝色天空渐变+太阳升起(translateY)+白云飘过(translateX)+绿色草地+花朵开放(scale)。日落: 天空变橙红+太阳落下。夜晚: 深蓝/黑色天空+月亮升起+星星闪烁(opacity动画)+萤火虫(position动画的小黄点)+城市灯光(窗户opacity)。黎明: 天空变粉+鸟群V形飞过(translateX)。所有元素用div+border-radius+伪元素绘制。建筑剪影(矩形组合)固定在底部。时间指示器(顶部文字: 清晨→上午→正午→下午→傍晚→夜晚)随动画切换。全部CSS keyframes, 无JavaScript。响应式。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个交互式万花筒。鼠标位置控制图案：移动鼠标生成彩色形状的对称反射（6重对称）。在鼠标位置绘制的形状在所有对称轴上镜像。颜色随时间循环彩虹色。轨迹渐隐效果。点击在4/6/8重对称模式间切换。黑色背景。

test_cases.name: Mouse interaction updates the kaleidoscope canvas state

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__round25_kaleido_before=(()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return ''; const ctx=c.getContext('2d'); const w=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.width||32)); const h=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.height||32)); let data; try{data=ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;}catch(e){return 'tainted';} let hash=0; for(let i=0;i<data.length;i+=4){hash=((hash<<5)-1 + data[i] + data[i+1] + data[i+2] + data[i+3])>>>0;} return String(hash);})(); return true;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders kaleidoscope pattern

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个交互式北极光。波浪状的绿色/蓝色/紫色光幕在暗色天空中起伏。鼠标X位置控制风（光幕漂移方向和速度）。鼠标Y控制强度（亮度和宽度）。点击创建一道向外扩散的明亮闪光。背景星星闪烁。底部山脉剪影。山脉附近的雾/薄雾层。山脉下方湖面上的光线倒影。Perlin噪声实现平滑波动。配色随时间缓慢变化。

test_cases.name: Mouse-ready scene has rich green-blue aurora curtains over dark mountains

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;let ctx;try{ctx=c.getContext('2d',{willReadFrequently:true});}catch(e){return false;}try{const w=c.width,h=c.height;const data=ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;let green=0,blue=0,bright=0,total=0,darkBottom=0;const sx=Math.max(1,Math.floor(w/96)),sy=Math.max(1,Math.floor(h/96));for(let y=0;y<h;y+=sy){for(let x=0;x<w;x+=sx){const i=(y*w+x)*4,R=data[i],G=data[i+1],B=data[i+2],A=data[i+3];if(A<10)continue;total++;if(y>h*.72&&R+G+B<100)darkBottom++;if(R+G+B>170)bright++;if(G>90&&G>R+15&&G>=B-35)green++;if(B>90&&B>R+20)blue++;}}return total>1000&&green>=120&&blue>=1000&&bright>=300&&darkBottom>=500;}catch(e){return false;}})()

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

test_cases.name: Mountain silhouette visible at bottom of canvas

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(0,c.height-30,c.width,30).data;let dark=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]<60)dark++;}return dark>10;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=[];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=true;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个交互式水波纹效果, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。平静的水面(蓝色渐变)。点击任意位置产生同心圆波纹向外扩散并衰减。多次点击产生多个独立波纹, 波纹相遇时产生干涉效果(波峰叠加变亮, 波峰波谷抵消变暗)。连续拖拽鼠标产生持续波纹(雨滴效果)。按R键模拟雨(随机位置大量波纹)。波纹速度和衰减滑块。反射: 波纹到达边缘反弹。底部显示3D透视水面(CSS perspective倾斜Canvas)。

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders calm water surface

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个交互式磁场可视化。500个铁屑粒子（小线段）沿2个可移动磁铁的磁场方向排列。拖拽红色(N极)和蓝色(S极)磁铁圆圈重新定位。粒子实时对齐显示磁力线。切换：粒子视图或连续磁力线视图（从N到S的曲线）。场强以颜色强度显示。添加磁铁按钮（最多5个）。移除磁铁按钮。地球磁场模拟预设。3D透视切换（CSS倾斜）。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["500"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders iron filing particles

prompt: 创建一个交互式音乐可视化场景, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。模拟32频段的音频频谱(正弦波生成, 非真实音频)。4种可视化模式切换: (1)柱状频谱(底部对齐, 颜色渐变), (2)环形频谱(圆形排列, 向外扩展), (3)粒子模式(粒子被频率驱动跳动), (4)波形模式(连续曲线)。鼠标左右移动控制模拟频率变化。空格键'播放/暂停'。BPM滑块(60-180)控制节拍速度。颜色主题3套(霓虹/海洋/火焰)。全屏Canvas, 深色背景, 发光效果。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders music visualization

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个交互式生态系统模拟。池塘环境包含：20条鱼（三角形，具有集群行为：对齐、凝聚、分离），5条捕食鱼（更大、红色、追逐最近的猎物），30个食物粒子（绿色圆点缓慢漂移）。鱼吃食物（食物消失，鱼略微长大）。捕食者吃小鱼。种群动态：鱼吃饱后繁殖（分裂成2条），饥饿10秒后死亡。食物每2秒随机再生。控制：添加食物（点击）、添加鱼（F键）、添加捕食者（P键）、速度滑块。统计面板：鱼数量、捕食者数量、食物数量、已用时间。种群随时间变化图（SVG小图表，每5秒更新）。昼夜循环（30秒周期，影响鱼的速度）。水面焦散效果背景。

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders pond with fish

prompt: 创建一个交互式天气系统模拟器, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。场景: 一个小城镇侧视图(简单房屋矩形+窗户+屋顶三角, 树木, 道路, 山丘背景)。天气控制面板: 5种天气可切换: (1)晴天: 太阳+蓝天+白云缓慢飘动, (2)雨天: 灰色天空+雨滴粒子从上方落下+地面水花+积水反射, (3)雪天: 灰白天空+雪花飘落(旋转下降)+地面积雪渐增, (4)雷暴: 暗天+大雨+闪电闪烁(随机位置白色闪光+音效模拟)+风吹树木摇摆, (5)雾天: 白色半透明层覆盖, 远处模糊。温度滑块(-10到40度, 影响场景: <0积雪, 0-15秋色树叶, >25强日照)。风力滑块(0-10级, 影响粒子方向和树木倾斜角度)。时间滑块(0-24h, 控制天空颜色和光照)。室内灯光(夜晚窗户自动亮)。人物(小火柴人)根据天气打伞/穿大衣。实时温度/湿度/风力/体感温度显示。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个交互式像素画沙盒。64×64像素网格。工具：铅笔（单像素）、直线、矩形、圆形、油漆桶、橡皮擦、取色器（从画布取色）。调色板：32色网格+自定义颜色选择器。画笔大小：1-4像素。图层：3个图层（每层可添加/移除/重排/切换可见性/调整透明度）。洋葱皮：隐约看到相邻图层。撤销/重做（50步）。网格线切换。缩放（鼠标滚轮1x-16x）。平移（空格+拖拽）。对称模式：水平/垂直/双向（绘制时镜像）。动画：底部4帧动画时间线，播放预览按钮，FPS控制，动画洋葱皮。导出：PNG（当前帧）、GIF（动画，所有帧）、精灵表。导入图片（缩放适配网格）。参考图叠加（可调透明度）。所有工具的键盘快捷键。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["1x-16x", "1-4", "64x64"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()
