steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["1x-16x", "1-4", "64x64"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "button, input[type=color]", "gte": 15}, {"selector": "body", "gte": 20}, {"selector": "button", "gte": 6}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过CSS和少量JS创建一个圣诞主题动画场景。飘雪（白色圆点带CSS动画向下飘落，随机位置和大小）。中央一棵圣诞树（绿色三角形堆叠，棕色矩形树干，彩色圆形装饰球，顶部发光星星）。闪烁的彩灯（沿树排列的彩色圆点，交替透明度动画）。'Merry Christmas'文字带糖果拐杖条纹配色。底部礼物盒（彩色矩形带丝带）。红绿配色方案，深蓝色夜晚背景。

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

prompt: 创建一个春节主题动画场景, 单个HTML文件。红色背景+金色元素。动画: 烟花(CSS animation, 多个彩色圆点从底部升起然后四散, 循环), 灯笼(两个红灯笼左右悬挂, 缓慢摇摆), 春联(竖排文字'福'字居中, 发光效果脉动)。飘落的金色纸屑(类似雪花动画)。'新春快乐'大字闪烁。全部CSS动画+最小JS。

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["happy new year", "new year", "happy"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个万圣节交互场景。夜景：满月（有移动的云朵飘过）、鬼屋剪影、带猫头鹰的枯树。恐怖元素：蝙蝠以8字形飞行、幽灵从房子后方飘起（半透明，摇摆）、南瓜灯带闪烁烛光（3个不同雕刻面的南瓜）。交互：点击任意位置召唤一只蜘蛛顺蛛丝垂下（CSS或Canvas）。鼠标移动产生手电筒效果（圆形明亮区域跟随光标，其余变暗）。地面雾气。'Happy Halloween'带滴血文字效果。恐怖配色：橙色、紫色、黑色、绿色。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders
Halloween modules and canvas surface are visible

steps.expression: (()=>{return document.querySelector('canvas')!==null && (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return false; const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase(); const hits=['happy halloween','halloween','moon','house','tree','owl','bat','ghost','pumpkin','spider','fog'].filter(t=>text.includes(t)).length; return hits>=4;})();})()

test_cases.name: Bats and clouds keep animating over time

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__round25_fest_before=(()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return ''; const ctx=c.getContext('2d'); const w=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.width||32)); const h=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.height||32)); let data; try{data=ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;}catch(e){return 'tainted';} let hash=0; for(let i=0;i<data.length;i+=4){hash=((hash<<5)-1 + data[i] + data[i+1] + data[i+2] + data[i+3])>>>0;} return String(hash);})(); return true;})()

(()=>{return (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return ''; const ctx=c.getContext('2d'); const w=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.width||32)); const h=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.height||32)); let data; try{data=ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;}catch(e){return 'tainted';} let hash=0; for(let i=0;i<data.length;i+=4){hash=((hash<<5)-1 + data[i] + data[i+1] + data[i+2] + data[i+3])>>>0;} return String(hash);})()!==window.__round25_fest_before && (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return false; const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase(); const hits=['happy halloween','halloween','moon','house','tree','owl','bat','ghost','pumpkin','spider','fog'].filter(t=>text.includes(t)).length; return hits>=4;})();})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["happy halloween", "halloween"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=true;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["happy halloween", "halloween"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "canvas", "gte": 1}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(patternHits>=1)&&(structureHits>=1);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Halloween scene renders on canvas

prompt: 创建一个中秋节互动场景, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。夜空背景(深蓝渐变)。大圆月亮(黄色, 有简单环形山纹理)。月亮中有玉兔剪影。天灯从底部缓慢升起(6个, 不同位置, 橙色发光)。桂花飘落(小黄点粒子)。荷塘: 底部水面倒影(月亮和天灯的模糊倒影), 3朵荷花(粉色)。交互: 点击放出新天灯。长按生成许愿文字(输入框弹出, 输入后文字跟随天灯升起)。团圆字样渐显。配乐按钮(模拟, 按钮切换图标)。

prompt: 用单个HTML文件创建一个情人节动画贺卡。粉红/红色渐变背景。中央一颗大心形由小心形组合而成（粒子从边缘飞入在3秒内形成心形）。组装完成后：心跳动画（缩放脉冲）。底部浮起的小心形像气泡上升。光标留下小心形轨迹。点击从点击处爆发心形。心形组装完成后揭示消息：'Happy Valentine\'s Day'配优雅手写字体。点击触发五彩纸屑炮效果。玫瑰花瓣雨（粉色椭圆飘落）。切换：添加自定义消息（文本输入，替换默认消息）。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders Valentine's scene

prompt: 用单个HTML文件构建一个新年倒计时庆典。全屏Canvas场景。倒计时器：大型数字显示从10开始倒数（或设置自定义时间）。00:00时：大规模烟花表演（20发同时在天空绽放，不同颜色和图案——牡丹、菊花、柳条、圆环）、两侧五彩纸屑炮、'HAPPY NEW YEAR 2026'文字带3D放大动画、模拟人群欢呼声（Web Audio噪声脉冲）、香槟开瓶动画（瓶塞飞出带气泡）。午夜前：城市天际线剪影、钟楼分针接近12点、底部人群剪影、期待粒子效果（火花）。烟花后：舞动的光束、极光般的波浪、迪斯科球派对模式（旋转球体带光线反射）。交互：点击任意处放烟花。音乐开关（模拟节拍）。年份选择器（更改显示的年份）。分享按钮（复制祝福到剪贴板）。重新开始倒计时按钮。

test_cases.name: Canvas renders rain simulation

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas构建一个森林火灾蔓延模拟。50×50网格代表森林。单元格状态：空地（黑色）、树木（绿色）、燃烧中（红/橙色带闪烁）、已烧毁（灰色）。点击点燃一棵树。火根据风向以一定概率蔓延到相邻树木。控制：风向（4个方向按钮或罗盘选择器）、风速滑块（影响蔓延概率）、湿度滑块（越低蔓延越快）。再生：已烧毁单元格缓慢恢复为树木（可开关）。统计：剩余树木百分比、时间、已烧毁树木数。重置按钮。速度滑块。暂停/播放。热力图叠加切换显示火灾风险。

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个四季变换场景, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。一棵大树居中, 随季节变化: 春(嫩绿叶子渐长+樱花飘落粉色花瓣), 夏(茂密深绿+蝉鸣波纹效果+热浪扭曲), 秋(叶子变黄变红+落叶飘落堆积地面), 冬(光秃枝干+雪花飘落+地面积雪)。天空颜色随季节变化。每个季节持续8秒, 平滑过渡。底部显示当前季节名称和月份。鸟群在春夏出现。手动切换按钮(4个季节按钮)。自动循环开关。

test_cases.name: Season progression updates the label and rendered scene over time

steps.expression: (()=>{window.__round25_nature_before={scene:(()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas'); if(!c) return ''; const ctx=c.getContext('2d'); const w=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.width||32)); const h=Math.max(1,Math.min(32,c.height||32)); let data; try{data=ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data;}catch(e){return 'tainted';} let hash=0; for(let i=0;i<data.length;i+=4){hash=((hash<<5)-hash + data[i] + data[i+1] + data[i+2] + data[i+3])>>>0;} const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').toLowerCase(); const season=(text.match(/spring|summer|autumn|winter|春|夏|秋|冬/i)||[''])[0]; return String(hash)+'|'+season;})(), label:(()=>{const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').trim(); const match=text.match(/(Spring|Summer|Autumn|Winter|春|夏|秋|冬|Jan|Feb|Mar|Apr|May|Jun|Jul|Aug|Sep|Oct|Nov|Dec)/i); return match?match[0]:'';})()}; return true;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders the seasonal tree scene

prompt: 用单个HTML文件通过Canvas创建一个地形侵蚀模拟。使用Perlin噪声生成高度图地形（256×256）。模拟水力侵蚀：雨滴落在随机位置，沿梯度下坡流动，带走沉积物，减速时沉积。可视化：高度图以彩色地形展示（蓝色水域、绿色低地、棕色山脉、白色山峰）。实时显示侵蚀过程（地形缓慢变化）。水流可视化：切换显示水量累积（蓝色叠加，越亮=流量越大）。控制：降雨量、侵蚀强度、沉积率、迭代次数滑块。前后对比：分屏切换。截面视图：在地形上点击一条水平线，下方显示海拔剖面SVG图表。3D预览：CSS透视倾斜。导出高度图为灰度PNG。统计：最低/最高海拔、水量、总侵蚀量。

test_cases.name: Canvas has non-trivial pixel data

steps.expression: (()=>{const c=document.querySelector('canvas');if(!c)return false;try{const ctx=c.getContext('2d');const d=ctx.getImageData(c.width/4,c.height/4,c.width/2,c.height/2).data;let n=0;for(let i=0;i<d.length;i+=16){if(d[i]+d[i+1]+d[i+2]>30)n++;}return n>d.length/64;}catch(e){return true;}})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const surface=document.querySelector('canvas,svg');const controls=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,input[type=range],select')].filter(visible).length;const darkHint=false;let themeOk=true;if(darkHint){const bg=getComputedStyle(document.body).backgroundColor||'';const nums=bg.match(/\d+/g)||[];if(nums.length>=3){themeOk=Number(nums[0])+Number(nums[1])+Number(nums[2])<360;}}return surface!==null&&themeOk&&(controls>=1||(document.body.innerText||'').trim().length>=20);})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["256x256", "elevation", "volume", "water", "min", "max"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Canvas renders terrain heightmap

prompt: 创建一个完整的生态系统模拟器, 单个HTML文件, Canvas渲染。一个岛屿俯视图(蓝色海洋中的绿色岛屿, 不规则形状由Perlin噪声生成)。生态: 草地(绿色, 自动生长), 兔子(白点, 吃草, 繁殖, 寿命30秒), 狐狸(橙点, 吃兔子, 繁殖, 寿命60秒), 鹰(灰点, 吃兔子, 飞行速度快, 寿命45秒)。种群动力: 食物链平衡, 过度繁殖→食物耗尽→种群崩溃→恢复循环。控制面板: 添加动物按钮(各类型), 初始数量滑块(兔10-100, 狐2-20, 鹰1-10)。种群图表(SVG): 3条线(兔/狐/鹰)的实时数量变化折线图。统计: 各种群数量, 出生/死亡计数, 模拟天数。速度控制(0.5x-5x)。暂停/恢复。灾难按钮(干旱: 草地减少50%, 瘟疫: 随机死亡30%)。日夜循环(影响动物行为: 夜间兔子不动, 狐狸更活跃)。迷你地图显示热力分布。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一个 SVG 插图，描绘一只坐立的卡通猫：圆形头部配尖耳朵，椭圆形眼睛和瞳孔，小三角形鼻子，每侧3根胡须，圆润的身体，弯曲的尾巴。橘色虎斑纹，带有深色条纹。猫坐在绿色草地上，背景为蓝天。viewBox 0 0 400 400。不使用外部资源。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["400.", "800", "400"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg path, svg polygon, svg circle, svg ellipse, svg rect", "gte": 15}, {"selector": "svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon, svg ellipse, svg line", "gte": 5}, {"selector": "path, circle, rect, polygon, ellipse", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(structureHits>=2);})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 用SVG创建一个卡通火箭发射插画。火箭在画面中央(圆锥头部+矩形机身+三角尾翼+圆形窗户)。底部有火焰(橙红渐变)。背景: 深蓝夜空+白色星星(小圆点随机分布)+弯月。一朵白云在左下角。viewBox 0 0 400 500。明亮卡通配色。

test_cases.name: SVG渲染
Primary interaction causes a visible state change tied to the task surface [tc_05]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const target=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg,svg *')].find(el=>visible(el));if(target){target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover',{bubbles:true})); if(target.click) target.click();}return true;})()

(()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["500.", "400", "500"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon, svg path, svg ellipse", "gte": 12}, {"selector": "svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon, svg ellipse, svg line", "gte": 5}, {"selector": "path, circle, rect, polygon, ellipse", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(true);})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

prompt: 创建一幅水下珊瑚礁场景的详细 SVG 插图。元素包括：波浪状蓝色水渐变背景，5 种不同的珊瑚形态（使用 path 绘制的分支状、脑纹状、扇形），3 条热带鱼（不同颜色、条纹图案），海草（波浪状绿色 path），气泡（上升的半透明圆形），沙质海底的海星（带橙色渐变的五边形），以及一个小宝箱。使用 linearGradient 和 radialGradient 营造深度效果。viewBox 为 0 0 800 500。

test_cases.name: SVG renders
Coral reef includes the prompt modules

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); if(!svg) return false; const paths=svg.querySelectorAll('path').length; const circles=svg.querySelectorAll('circle').length; const polygons=svg.querySelectorAll('polygon').length; const rects=svg.querySelectorAll('rect').length; const translucent=[...svg.querySelectorAll('circle')].filter(el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el); const op=parseFloat(s.opacity||el.getAttribute('opacity')||'1'); const fo=parseFloat(s.fillOpacity||el.getAttribute('fill-opacity')||'1'); return op<1 || fo<1;}).length; return paths>=12 && circles>=4 && polygons>=1 && rects>=1 && translucent>=3;})()

test_cases.name: Reef structure remains visible after a short pause

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); if(!svg||svg.getAttribute('viewBox')!=='0 0 800 500') return false; const shapes=svg.querySelectorAll('path,circle,ellipse,polygon,rect').length; const bubbles=[...svg.querySelectorAll('circle')].filter(el=>{const s=getComputedStyle(el); return parseFloat(s.opacity||el.getAttribute('opacity')||'1')<1 || parseFloat(s.fillOpacity||el.getAttribute('fill-opacity')||'1')<1;}).length; return shapes>=20 && bubbles>=3;})()

test_cases.name: Three fish remain separately represented in the scene

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); if(!svg) return false; const paths=svg.querySelectorAll('path').length; const groups=svg.querySelectorAll('g').length; const fishHint=paths>=12 && groups>=3; const starfish=svg.querySelectorAll('polygon, path, ellipse').length>=12; return fishHint && starfish;})()

prompt: 用SVG创建一个中国风庭院插画。元素: 红色飞檐亭子(用path绘制弯曲屋顶), 圆拱门, 竹子(绿色矩形+叶子), 假山(灰色不规则path), 锦鲤鱼池(蓝色椭圆+两条橙色鱼), 石板路(灰色矩形排列), 樱花树(棕色树干+粉色圆点花朵)。背景: 浅黄宣纸色。使用中国传统配色(朱红/靛蓝/翠绿/墨黑)。viewBox 0 0 800 500。

(()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["500.", "800", "500"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg ellipse, svg polygon", "gte": 30}, {"selector": "svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon, svg ellipse, svg line", "gte": 5}, {"selector": "path, circle, rect, polygon, ellipse", "gte": 5}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(true);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["500.", "800", "500"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Rendered UI does not show undefined, NaN, or object placeholders

steps.expression: (()=>{const text=(()=>{const walker=document.createTreeWalker(document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(node){const p=node.parentElement;if(!p) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;if(p.closest('pre,code,script,style,textarea')) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;}});let text='';while(walker.nextNode()){text+=' '+(walker.currentNode.nodeValue||'');}return text.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();})();return !(/\[object Object\]|\bundefined\b|\bNaN\b/.test(text));})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建详细的 SVG 等距城市街区插图。建筑：3-4 栋不同高度的楼房，带有窗户（小矩形网格排列），一家带遮阳篷的商铺，一栋具有玻璃幕墙效果的高层办公楼。街道：灰色路面配白色车道标线、人行横道。车辆：一辆公交车（侧视图、等距视角）、一辆出租车。树木：5 棵风格化树木（树干上圆形树冠）。人物：3 个简约人形（简笔画增强风格）。街道设施：交通信号灯、长椅、邮箱。全部采用等距投影（30 度角）。扁平化配色风格，阴影方向统一（右下方）。viewBox 0 0 1000 700。

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 创建一幅精细的蒸汽朋克机械钟SVG插图。中央是一个大型钟面，配有罗马数字(I-XII)、装饰华丽的时针与分针，以及环绕边缘的齿轮齿。钟面后方可见5个大小不一的黄铜齿轮相互啮合。添加蒸汽管道（带铆钉的曲线路径）、压力表（带指针的小型圆形表盘）、链条和传动齿轮。采用黄铜/铜/青铜色调的渐变配色方案。使用类噪点图案模拟做旧金属质感。钟面上方添加玻璃圆顶效果（半透明）。viewBox设置为0 0 600 600。

prompt: 构建一个SVG动画天气场景，循环展示四季景象。春季：雨滴落下，花朵生长；夏季：阳光明媚，热浪滚滚；秋季：树叶飘落并变色；冬季：雪花缓缓飘下。每个季节持续5秒，之间通过平滑的淡入淡出效果过渡。需显示季节名称。使用SMIL的animate、animateTransform和animateMotion元素。viewBox设置为0 0 600 400。

steps.selector: svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon

test_cases.name: Season labels are present in the SVG scene

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt: 使用纯 CSS 和 HTML div 绘制一只熊猫（不使用 SVG、Canvas 或图片）。熊猫细节：白色圆形头部、黑色眼罩（椭圆形）、黑色耳朵、黑色鼻子、弯曲的嘴巴、白色身体、黑色手臂和腿部。熊猫呈坐姿，手持一根竹棍（绿色矩形并带有叶片）。背景：渐变绿色竹林（重复的垂直绿色条状，具有不同的透明度）。添加微妙的呼吸动画（身体每 3 秒从 1.0 轻微缩放至 1.02）。

prompt: 创建一个纯CSS动画夜景城市（不使用SVG、Canvas或图片）。天际线：8栋高度和宽度各异的建筑，窗户亮着灯（黄色点阵网格，部分随机熄灭）。建筑具有不同风格（平顶、尖顶、带天线）。前景：一条道路，汽车前灯以动画形式驶过（水平移动的发光圆点）。天空：从深紫色到黑色的渐变，闪烁的星星（对box-shadow透明度应用CSS动画），一个闪烁的霓虹灯牌。底部的水面倒影（使用CSS transform实现波浪扭曲的镜像建筑）。带陨石坑的月亮（多个border-radius）。带有闪烁灯光的飞机缓慢划过天空。

test_cases.name: Water reflection, moon craters, airplane light, and road headlights are CSS-defined

(()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["48x48"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const checks=[{"selector": "svg path, svg circle, svg rect, svg polygon, svg ellipse, svg line", "gte": 5}, {"selector": "svg", "gte": 8}, {"selector": "svg", "gte": 4}];let structureHits=0;for(const c of checks){try{const n=[...document.querySelectorAll(c.selector)].filter(visible).length; if(n>=c.gte) structureHits++;}catch(err){}}return surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&(true)&&(true);})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(true) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(true) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()

test_cases.name: Six food icons use 48x48 SVGs with consistent 2px stroke primitives

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const icons=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(visible).filter(svg=>(svg.getAttribute('viewBox')||'').trim()==='0 0 48 48');const text=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();const foods=['coffee','pizza','burger','sushi','cake','ice cream'];if(icons.length<6||!foods.every(f=>text.includes(f)))return false;let exact2Total=0;return icons.slice(0,6).every(svg=>{let exact2=0;for(const el of svg.querySelectorAll('path,circle,rect,polygon,ellipse,line,polyline')){const stroke=(el.getAttribute('stroke')||getComputedStyle(el).stroke||'').trim();if(!stroke||stroke==='none'||stroke==='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)')continue;const sw=(el.getAttribute('stroke-width')||getComputedStyle(el).strokeWidth||'').trim();if(sw==='2'||sw==='2px')exact2++;}exact2Total+=exact2;return exact2>=2;})&&exact2Total>=18;})()

prompt: 创建一个全面的SVG图标集，包含12个导航/UI图标，以4x3网格排列。图标包括：home、search、menu（汉堡菜单）、close（X）、back arrow、forward arrow、up chevron、down chevron、plus、minus、check、info（圆圈内i）。支持两种样式变体切换：outlined（仅描边）和filled（实心）。所有图标尺寸为32x32，描边粗细统一为2px。每个图标下方显示名称。使用CSS变量控制图标颜色（可通过颜色选择器输入更改）。提供导出按钮，将所有图标保存为单个SVG sprite sheet。

test_cases.name: Icons render
Icon names are rendered below the icons rather than omitted

steps.expression: (()=>{const labels=[...document.querySelectorAll('figcaption, label, p, span, div')].filter(el=>{const txt=(el.innerText||'').trim().toLowerCase(); return ['home','search','menu','close','back','forward','up','down','plus','minus','check','info'].includes(txt);}); return labels.length>=10;})()

test_cases.name: Icon tiles keep a roughly consistent displayed size

steps.expression: (()=>{const svgs=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width>0&&r.height>0;}); if(svgs.length<4) return false; const ws=svgs.map(el=>el.getBoundingClientRect().width); return Math.max(...ws)-Math.min(...ws) <= 24;})()

test_cases.name: Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["32x32,", "4x3", "home", "menu"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

prompt: 构建一套包含8个状态/通知图标的动画SVG图标集。图标分别为：loading spinner（旋转）、success checkmark（draw-in animation）、error X（shake animation）、warning triangle（pulse glow）、info bubble（bounce in）、download arrow（falling motion）、upload arrow（rising motion）、sync arrows（continuous rotation）。每个图标循环播放动画，并支持独立的play/pause切换。采用4x2网格布局，统一尺寸48x48，现代圆角风格。

test_cases.name: Primary interaction causes a visible state change tied to the task surface [tc_05]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const target=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg,svg *')].find(el=>visible(el));if(target){target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover',{bubbles:true})); if(target.click) target.click();}return true;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

prompt:
创建一个SVG图标设计系统，包含16个电商图标，以4x4网格布局排列。图标包括：购物车(cart)、购物袋(bag)、信用卡(credit card)、卡车/配送(truck/delivery)、包裹(package)、条形码(barcode)、收据(receipt)、标签/价格(tag/price)、礼物(gift)、商店(store)、钱包(wallet)、硬币(coins)、优惠券(coupon)、星星/评分(star/rating)、退货箭头(return arrow)、盾牌/安全(shield/secure)。

交互功能：点击图标即可选中，并在下方的代码预览面板中显示对应的SVG代码。提供尺寸滑块（16px至64px）用于调整所有图标大小，以及描边宽度滑块（1-4px）。包含3种配色方案预设，每个图标均配有复制SVG按钮。支持按名称搜索和筛选图标，采用响应式网格布局。

test_cases.name: Icons render
Icon grid binds at least 14 prompted e-commerce names to visible SVG drawings

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>12&&r.height>12;};const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim().toLowerCase();const labels=['cart','bag','credit card','truck','package','barcode','receipt','tag','gift','store','wallet','coins','coupon','star','return','shield'];const blocks=[...document.querySelectorAll('article,li,button,[role=button],.icon,.card,[class*=icon],[class*=card],svg')].filter(visible).map(el=>{const text=norm([el.innerText,el.textContent,el.getAttribute('aria-label'),el.getAttribute('title'),el.querySelector('title')?.textContent,el.querySelector('desc')?.textContent].filter(Boolean).join(' '));const svg=el.matches('svg')?el:el.querySelector('svg');const shapes=svg?[...svg.querySelectorAll('path,circle,rect,polygon,polyline,line,ellipse')].filter(visible).length:0;const box=(svg||el).getBoundingClientRect();return {text,shapes,area:box.width*box.height};});const matched=new Set();for(const label of labels){const words=label.split(/\s+/);const hit=blocks.some(b=>words.every(w=>b.text.includes(w))&&b.shapes>=2&&b.area>=100);if(hit)matched.add(label);}return matched.size>=14&&matched.has('cart')&&matched.has('credit card')&&matched.has('shield')&&matched.has('return');})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg'); if(svg) return svg.querySelectorAll('*').length>=8; if(document.querySelectorAll('div,span').length>=10) return true; return false;})()

test_cases.name: Icon names
16 SVG icons in grid
Mobile layout preserves prompt-grounded content instead of only a viewport tag [tc_16]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const norm=(s)=>String(s||'').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const collectText=()=>{const parts=[document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||''];for(const el of document.querySelectorAll('[alt],[title],[aria-label],input,textarea,option,button,a')){parts.push(el.getAttribute('alt')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('title')||'');parts.push(el.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');parts.push(el.value||'');parts.push(el.textContent||'');}return norm(parts.join(' '));};const broken=(text)=>/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]|\bundefined\b|\bnan\b/i.test(text);const surfaceOk=(()=>{const svg=document.querySelector('svg');const shapes=document.querySelectorAll('svg path,svg circle,svg rect,svg polygon,svg ellipse,svg line').length;return svg!==null&&shapes>=4;})();const text=collectText();const patterns=["1-4", "4x4", "truck", "cart", "card", "bag"];let patternHits=0;for(const token of patterns){if(token&&text.includes(token)) patternHits++;}const patternsOk=patternHits>=1;const root=document.documentElement;const widthOk=(root.scrollWidth||document.body.scrollWidth)<=430;return widthOk&&surfaceOk&&!broken(text)&&patternsOk;})()

test_cases.name: Primary interaction causes a visible state change tied to the task surface [tc_custom_05]

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const target=[...document.querySelectorAll('svg,svg *')].find(el=>visible(el));if(target){target.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseover',{bubbles:true})); if(target.click) target.click();}return true;})()

test_cases.name: Theme and component styling are coherent instead of checking a single cursor or color property

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=(el)=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el);const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const luminance=(rgb)=>{const nums=(rgb.match(/\d+/g)||[]).slice(0,3).map(Number); if(nums.length<3) return null; return nums[0]+nums[1]+nums[2];};const styled=(el)=>{if(!el||!visible(el)) return false; const s=getComputedStyle(el); return s.backgroundImage.includes('gradient')||s.boxShadow!=='none'||parseFloat(s.borderRadius||'0')>0||parseFloat(s.borderWidth||'0')>0||s.backdropFilter!=='none'||s.transitionDuration!=='0s'||(s.backgroundColor&&s.backgroundColor!=='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'&&s.backgroundColor!=='transparent');};const surfaces=[document.body,...document.querySelectorAll('main,header,section,article,nav,aside,footer,button,a,input,textarea,select,table,canvas,svg,[class*=card]')].filter(Boolean);let styledCount=0;for(const el of surfaces){if(styled(el)) styledCount++;}const bodyStyle=getComputedStyle(document.body);const bodyLum=luminance(bodyStyle.backgroundColor||'');let themeOk=true; if(false) themeOk=bodyLum===null||bodyLum<420; if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&(bodyLum===null||bodyLum>360);if(false) themeOk=themeOk&&surfaces.some(el=>getComputedStyle(el).backgroundImage.includes('gradient'));return styledCount>=3&&themeOk;})()

steps.expression: (()=>{const visible=el=>{if(!el)return false;const s=getComputedStyle(el),r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return s.display!=='none'&&s.visibility!=='hidden'&&parseFloat(s.opacity||'1')>0&&r.width>0&&r.height>0;};const text=(document.body.innerText||document.body.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const broken=/unexpected token|unexpected end of input|invalid or unexpected token|referenceerror|typeerror|syntaxerror|is not defined|\[object object\]| undefined | nan /i.test(text);const media=[...document.querySelectorAll('canvas,svg,img,video')].some(visible);const surface=[...document.querySelectorAll('main,section,article,div,table,ul,ol,canvas,svg,img,video')].some(el=>{if(!visible(el))return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width*r.height>=1200;});return !broken&&(media||text.length>=20||surface);})()
